leadText: Infiltrator (Japanese: すりぬけ Slip Through) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generations V-VI 1.1.2 Generation VII onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations V-VI [ edit | edit source ] Moves used by a Pokémon with Infiltrator bypass the effects of targets' Reflect , Light Screen , Safeguard , and Mist . Generation VII onward [ edit | edit source ] Moves used by a Pokémon with Infiltrator also bypass the effects of targets' Aurora Veil . Moves used by a Pokémon with Infiltrator, except Transform and Sky Drop , also bypass the effects of targets' substitutes . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability effect may be in need of research. Reason: BDSP You can discuss this on the talk page. In Pokémon Sword and Shield , if a Pokémon with Infiltrator is in the first place in the party (even if fainted ), the chance of generating a random encounter is decreased by 87.5%.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations V-VI [ edit | edit source ] Moves used by a Pokémon with Infiltrator bypass the effects of targets' Reflect , Light Screen , Safeguard , and Mist . Generation VII onward [ edit | edit source ] Moves used by a Pokémon with Infiltrator also bypass the effects of targets' Aurora Veil . Moves used by a Pokémon with Infiltrator, except Transform and Sky Drop , also bypass the effects of targets' substitutes .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI The Pokémon's moves can hit foes that used Reflect, Light Screen, Safeguard, or Mist. * The Pokémon can land moves on targets that have used Reflect, Light Screen, or Safeguard! It also isn't affected by Mist. * S MD The Pokémon's moves are not affected by Reflect , Light Screen , or Safeguard ! They are also not affected by mist.
